# Commercial License Placeholder

This file serves as a placeholder for future commercial licensing terms. Organizations or companies wishing to use the framework outside of the GNU GPL v3 license restrictions may inquire about obtaining a proprietary license.

Contact [Your Name or Email Here] for negotiations regarding commercial use.

2. Duration and extent of use.
3. Additional support or customization requests.

A formal commercial license will then be crafted based on these requirements.
